title: Add persistent event photo storage and management for organizers

requirements.text: Add stable storage for event photos in the backend with fields for photo ID, organizer principal, image blob data, content type, filename, and upload timestamp

quotes: Event photos, yes persist permanently until deleted by organisers

acceptanceCriteria: Event photos are stored in stable memory and persist across canister upgrades
Each photo record includes organizer ownership information
Photo data includes blob content, MIME type, and metadata

requirements.text: Implement backend methods for uploading event photos (uploadEventPhoto) that accepts image blob data, content type, and filename, returning the created photo ID

quotes: Image upload functionality in the organizers section with backend storage

acceptanceCriteria: Only authenticated organizers can upload photos
Upload method accepts blob data with content type validation
Returns unique photo ID upon successful upload

requirements.text: Implement backend method for retrieving event photos (getEventPhotos) that returns all photos belonging to the calling organizer with image data and metadata

quotes: Proper persistence using the Internet Computer's stable storage
Fix for the 'image not found' issue by ensuring images are properly stored and retrieved from the backend

acceptanceCriteria: Returns array of photo objects with blob data and metadata
Only returns photos owned by the calling organizer
Images persist across browser sessions and tab closures

requirements.text: Implement backend method for deleting event photos (deleteEventPhoto) that accepts a photo ID and removes it from storage, with authorization check to ensure only the photo owner can delete

quotes: Delete functionality for organizers to remove images permanently

acceptanceCriteria: Only the organizer who uploaded a photo can delete it
Photo is permanently removed from stable storage
Returns success confirmation or error if photo not found

requirements.text: Add event photo upload interface to the OrganizerDashboard page with file input supporting JPG, PNG, and WebP formats, upload progress indicator, and preview of uploaded images

quotes: Upload Interface - Image upload in the organizers section

acceptanceCriteria: File input accepts image files (JPG, PNG, WebP)
Shows upload progress during file transfer
Displays preview thumbnails of uploaded images
Upload interface is accessible from organizer dashboard

requirements.text: Create an event photo gallery component that displays all uploaded event photos in a grid layout with full-size lightbox view and navigation controls

quotes: Gallery View - Display all uploaded event photos with proper retrieval from backend

acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays all event photos uploaded by the organizer
Grid layout with responsive design
Clicking photo opens full-size lightbox modal
Lightbox includes navigation controls to browse photos

requirements.text: Add delete buttons to each event photo in the gallery that trigger deleteEventPhoto backend call with confirmation dialog before deletion

quotes: Delete Feature - Allow organizers to remove images permanently

acceptanceCriteria: Each photo has a visible delete button
Confirmation dialog appears before deletion
Successfully deleted photos are removed from gallery immediately
Error handling for failed deletions with user feedback

requirements.text: Create React Query hooks for event photo operations: useUploadEventPhoto, useGetEventPhotos, and useDeleteEventPhoto with proper cache invalidation

quotes: Ensure images persist across browser sessions and tab closures

acceptanceCriteria: Upload hook handles file to blob conversion and backend upload
Get photos hook fetches and caches event photos from backend
Delete hook invalidates cache after successful deletion
All hooks include loading and error states

constraints: Use existing backend single-actor architecture in backend/main.mo
Follow existing PortfolioUpload.tsx and PortfolioGallery.tsx patterns for event photo components
Integrate event photo upload and gallery into existing OrganizerDashboard page layout
Use existing authentication system via useInternetIdentity hook
Follow existing file naming conventions and project structure
nonGoals: Adding event photo upload for guests or admins
Implementing image editing or filtering features
Adding size or format restrictions on uploads
Creating separate event photo management page outside organizer dashboard
